chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-340 of 2013 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 1999/13 2. For Katcha Peshi. 3. For orders on M.A 2000/13 24.01.2018. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. Syed Meeral Shah A.P.G. for the State. This petition is called for hearing. Neither petitioner nor his Counsel is present. No intimation received. This petition received from the Principal Seat Karachi as the matter pertains to Circuit Court Hyderabad. It also appears from the record that this petition was received to this Court on 20.11.2014. It also appears from the record that since then nobody on behalf of the petitioner is diligently pursuing this petition. Since the question of life and liberty of the petitioner is involved in the petition, therefore, we have ourselves gone through the contents of memo of petition showing that through this petition the petitioner is seeking protection of his life and liberty as according to the petitioner the official respondents at the behest of private respondents are harassing him. Learned A.A.G and A.P.G are present in Court and have denied this fact and have stated that neither the official respondents have harassed the petitioner nor they intend to do so and they further state that the official respondents would act strictly in accordance with law. In view of above, this petition appears to have achieved its purpose therefore, the same is disposed of alongwith listed applications with direction to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law. Office is directed to provide copy of this order to the learned A.A.G for compliance.

In view of above, this petition appears to have achieved its purpose therefore, the same is disposed of alongwith listed applications with direction to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law. Office is directed to provide copy of this order to the learned A.A.G for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
